flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Dickinson State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.1k → $9.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Dickinson State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Dickinson State University rose 39% between 2021 and 2024 (36.4% → 50.6%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Dickinson State University rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (18.4% → 23.1%).
